name: Leonum (Cleansed Tigris)
description: Leonum, once a feral villain feared as Tigris, has risen from predator to protector. His golden mane and gleaming fangs mark him as a beast of raw power, but it is his roaring heart of justice that makes him a hero. With superhuman strength, predator’s instincts, and a combat style that blurs the line between savage and disciplined, Leonum dives headfirst into chaos with fearless pride. He is the lion of the streets bold, brash, and unbreakable, daring any villain to test his claws.
creator: ArcWarden
